tagline: Turn your gratitude into a hypnotic euphoric state.
liner: This driving D-major progressive house anthem arrives at 129 BPM, carrying the weight of deep basslines and soaring synth leads that build from quiet reverence to explosive release. A minimalist electronic track where repetitive vocal affirmations transform internal reflection into collective joy. As intensity climbs through the verses and chorus, listeners surrender completely to a trance-like state of sonic connection. The journey culminates in peak euphoric abandon before fading back into an eternal rhythm of gratitude.
worldCaption: A D-major world built on deep basslines where repetitive affirmations turn quiet reverence into explosive collective joy.

bios.lead: Cuts through the mix with a soaring, euphoric call.
bios.back: Echoes every word to build the hypnotic choir within.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking without ever missing a downbeat.
bios.perc: Adds subtle texture that guides the rhythmic heartbeat forward.
bios.bass: Anchors the entire sonic structure with deep, resonant weight.
bios.synth: Paints wide arcs of light to lift spirits into trance.
bios.other: Weaves quiet dust and shimmer across every open space.
bios.guitar: Adds rare warmth that softens the digital edge slightly.
